text:
Athens Times

—

Red Hot Chili Peppers , Snoop Dogg and Billie Eilish will sing at the Paris closing ceremony on Sunday (11.8.24). The tradition of the Summer Olympics from Paris to Los Angeles will be impressive, as artists will appear from Los Angeles in a mixture of recorded and live performances. Producer Ben Winston, who is not a stranger to live music events as a producer of Grammy Awards and the “Adele: One Night Only” tribute of 2021 by CBS, is coordinated with the French producers of the closing ceremony, according to Variety. The situation is tense with regard to live concerts this week, after authorities in Austria prevented a terrorist attack plan during Taylor Swift’s planned three-day performances in Vienna as part of the “The Eras Tour” tour. Sources from the concert-surprise organizers in Los Angeles said security and public control were a sign of concern for local police officials even before being informed of the unpleasant news from Vienna. Security should take steps for potential threats from air, land and sea to Los Angeles. Due to intense fears, Variety does not reveal the venue for the concert. At the end of the closing ceremony Sunday, Los Angeles mayor Karen Bass will pick up the Olympic flame and take it to the city, as she returns from Paris. As of next week, the city of Los Angeles will have three years and 11 months to prepare for the Summer Games, which are scheduled to take place from July 14 to July 30, 2028 .

Athens Times

News about Greece and the World.
title: Olympic Games 2024: Red Hot Chili Peppers, Snoop Dogg and Billie Eilish will sing at the closing ceremony - Athens Times
